components.description: Vertical feed for richer activity history, updates, and audit-style event streams.

components.description: Persistent contextual action bar for bulk actions and page-level commands.

components.description: Right-click menu surface that composes Emberline menu primitives.

events.description: Fired when the menu opens or closes.
events.name: toggle

slots.description: Element that receives context menu and keyboard-open interaction.

components.description: Searchable, sortable application data table built from native table semantics.

properties.description: Caption rendered above the table when provided.
properties.name: caption

properties.description: Column definitions assigned as a property from JavaScript.
properties.name: columns

properties.description: Message shown when no visible rows remain after filtering or loading completes.
properties.name: emptyMessage

properties.description: Shows the loading state instead of row data.
properties.name: loading

properties.description: Maximum number of rows shown per page. Set to 0 to disable pagination.
properties.name: pageSize

properties.description: Row data assigned as a property from JavaScript.
properties.name: rows

properties.description: Enables the built-in search toolbar and filtering behavior.
properties.name: searchable

properties.description: Accessible label applied to the internal search control.
properties.name: searchLabel

properties.description: Placeholder text shown in the internal search control.
properties.name: searchPlaceholder

properties.description: Current search query used to filter visible rows.
properties.name: searchQuery

properties.description: Active sort direction for the current sort key.
properties.name: sortDirection

properties.description: Column key currently used for sorting.
properties.name: sortKey

events.description: Fired when the active sort column or direction changes.
events.name: sort-change

events.description: Fired when the current page changes through pagination.
events.name: page-change

events.description: Fired when the search query changes and the matching row count updates.
events.name: search-change

components.summary: Searchable, sortable data table for application records.

components.description:
Rule and group based filtering UI built from native fieldset, select, and input controls.

The serialized `value` property stores the current filter group as JSON.

events.name: input

events.name: change

components.description: Horizontal application menubar with roving keyboard focus.

Searchable multi-select built from Emberline listbox and option primitives.

Use light-DOM `option` or `emb-option` children as the source option set.

events.name: input

events.name: change

components.description:
Keyboard-accessible side navigation landmark with nested sections.

Use direct child `emb-side-nav-item` elements, optionally nesting them to
create collapsible sections.

Navigable row used inside EmbSideNav.

Set `href` to render the row as a link, or omit it to render a button-like
item that can toggle its nested children.

events.description: Fired when the expanded branch state changes.
events.name: toggle

events.description: Fired when a non-link leaf item is activated.
events.name: side-nav-select

slots.description: Optional leading decoration such as an icon.
slots.name: start

components.description:
Hierarchical item used inside EmbTreeView.

Set `label` for the visible row text and nest additional `emb-tree-item`
elements in the default slot to create branches.

events.description: Fired when the expanded branch state changes.
events.name: toggle

events.description: Fired when the row is activated.
events.name: tree-item-select

slots.description: Optional leading decoration for the tree row.
slots.name: start

slots.description: Nested child `emb-tree-item` elements for branch content.
slots.name: default

components.description:
Keyboard-accessible single-selection tree view.

Use nested `emb-tree-item` elements to create branches and leaves.

events.description: Fired when the selected item changes.
events.name: input

events.description: Fired when the selected item changes.
